sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Palhna le vul-na kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
Lawp-na le lau-na kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khuadam le khualum kheng gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
gal khatah, Tawntung le tawntung lo gal khatah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
gal-ah, Dip-kuat-na le ngaih muanna galah,
Manlang in-ah ka tung ding hi.
